# Access control

Every state-changing function in the Catalog contracts and who may call it. Generated from the per-contract references; the per-function pages carry the full behavior.

## Catalog

| Function | Access |
| --- | --- |
| [`addContract`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addcontract) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`addContractFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addcontractfor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an address it approved via `setOperator`, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`removeContract`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removecontract) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`removeContractFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removecontractfor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an approved operator, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`addToken`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addtoken) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`addTokenFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addtokenfor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an approved operator, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`removeToken`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removetoken) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`removeTokenFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removetokenfor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an approved operator, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`addTokenRange`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addtokenrange) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`addTokenRangeFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#addtokenrangefor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an approved operator, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`removeTokenRange`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removetokenrange) | permissionless (writes only the caller's own list) |
| [`removeTokenRangeFor`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#removetokenrangefor) | artist or operator (the `artist` argument, or an approved operator, else `NotAuthorized`) |
| [`setOperator`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#setoperator) | permissionless (sets only the caller's own operator slot) |
| [`multicall`](/docs/catalog/contracts/catalog#multicall) | permissionless (each inner call enforces its own authorization) |
